metadata.description: Personal collection of miscellaneous Claude Code plugins by aeresov.

plugins.name: openvpn3-on-demand
plugins.description: Bring up an OpenVPN3 tunnel on demand before Claude runs commands against private network resources, and tear it down at task end.

plugins.name: mysql-client
plugins.description: Drive the `mysql` CLI safely against MySQL or MariaDB databases — read-only-first, with a subagent for multi-step investigations.
